ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient (e.g., 70 or Older) */,
  "zip_code_3_digits" TEXT /* First three digits of the patient's zip code */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., M, F) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient (e.g., White, Black/African American) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient (e.g., Not Span/Hispanic, Unknown) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance the patient has (e.g., Medicare, Private Health Insurance) */,
  "patient_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_county" TEXT /* County where the hospital is located */,
  "health_service_area" TEXT /* Health service area where the hospital operates */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., Public, Private, Teaching) */,
  "hospital_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the hospital (number of beds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being admitted */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the patient is admitted */,
  "type_of_admission" TEXT /* Type of admission (e.g., Emergency, Elective) */,
  "emergency_department_indicator" TEXT /* Indicator for emergency department visit (Y/N) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "admitting_diagnosis" TEXT /* Admitting diagnosis of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "patient_disposition" TEXT /* Patient disposition after discharge (e.g., Skilled Nursing Home, Home or Self Care) */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient at discharge (e.g., Alive, Deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispositions_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "ccs_diagnosis_code" INTEGER /* CCS diagnosis code */,
  "ccs_diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the CCS diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnosis (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "ccs_procedure_code" INTEGER /* CCS procedure code */,
  "ccs_procedure_description" TEXT /* Description of the CCS procedure */,
  "procedure_type" TEXT /* Type of procedure (e.g., Surgical, Diagnostic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aprs" (
  "apr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each APR entry */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "apr_drg_code" INTEGER /* APR-DRG code */,
  "apr_drg_description" TEXT /* Description of the APR-DRG */,
  "apr_mdc_code" INTEGER /* APR-MDC code */,
  "apr_mdc_description" TEXT /* Description of the APR-MDC */,
  "apr_severity_of_illness_code" INTEGER /* APR severity of illness code */,
  "apr_severity_of_illness_description" TEXT /* Description of the APR severity of illness */,
  "apr_risk_of_mortality" TEXT /* APR risk of mortality */,
  "apr_medical_surgical_description" TEXT /* APR medical surgical description */,
  "aprs_version" TEXT /* Version of the APRs (e.g., APR-DRG V32) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aprs_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "payment_typology_1" TEXT /* Primary payment typology (e.g., Medicare, Private Health Insurance) */,
  "payment_typology_2" TEXT /* Secondary payment typology */,
  "payment_typology_3" TEXT /* Tertiary payment typology */,
  "total_charges" REAL /* Total charges for the admission */,
  "total_costs" REAL /* Total costs for the admission */,
  "payment_source" TEXT /* Source of the payment (e.g., Government, Private Insurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., Attending Provider, Operating Provider) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider (e.g., Cardiology, Oncology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_providers" (
  "admission_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission-provider relationship */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., Attending Provider, Operating Provider) */,
  "provider_role" TEXT /* Role of the provider in the admission (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_providers_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birth_weights" (
  "birth_weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birth weight entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "birth_weight" INTEGER /* Birth weight of the patient (in grams) */,
  "abortion_edit_indicator" TEXT /* Abortion edit indicator (Y/N) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("birth_weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_weights_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_visits" (
  "emergency_visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "emergency_department_indicator" TEXT /* Indicator for emergency department visit (Y/N) */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the emergency visit */,
  "chief_complaint" TEXT /* Chief complaint of the patient during the emergency visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emergency_visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_visits_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., Emergency, Routine) */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "financial_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "total_charges" REAL /* Total charges for the admission */,
  "total_costs" REAL /* Total costs for the admission */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "length_of_stay" (
  "los_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length of stay entry */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "length_of_stay" INTEGER /* Length of stay (in days) */,
  "extended_stay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for extended stay (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("los_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_length_of_stay_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "medication_dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "medication_administration_date" TEXT /* Date of medication administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result entry */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admission */,
  "lab_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "lab_test_result" TEXT /* Result of the laboratory test */,
  "lab_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the laboratory test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)
